info.title: Talking Performance 360 feedback
info.description:
Hi, I'm doing a 360 review for XXX, who has identified you as someone who could provide constructive feedback for them. 

Note to manager:
1/ do search and replace of 'XXX' with name
2/ add key projects in question 1
3/ delete these notes

items.title:
These are key projects XXX worked on in recent months. 

Please tick those you have experience of, and add a description in Other if you did work together which isn't listed.
Thinking about those projects, how would you describe your experience of working with XXX? What were the highlights? The challenges?
Thinking about what they work on, what projects do you think XXX could take on or do differently to have even greater impact for ITV?

Thinking now about how they work, As a reminder these are the 6 ITV behaviours. Which of these would you say XXX most exhibits in their work? Please give examples.

- Digital Mindset - supports the digital transformation of ITV by integrating digital thinking to challenge existing processes and approaches
- Creativity & Innovation - encourages and contributes to a culture of experiment and innovation, including managed risk-taking
- Agility - responds to and anticipates changes in business need driven by internal or external environment
- Clarity & Pace - sets clear expectations to help move projects quickly forward
- Collaboration - develops relationships and partnerships by supporting, collaborating and inspiring both internally and externally 
- Cultivates Resilience - actively manages stressful and difficult situations for self and those around them
A key focus for the whole of the CS&P team in 2023 is greater proactivity. What could XXX do to be more proactive in their work?
Anything else you'd like to add to help XXX develop?
